title: Favorite Least Favorite Angel and Why
display_title: Favorite Least Favorite Angel and Why
wikitext:
[]: Favorite/Least Favorite Angel and Why             Quote Post by Dave » Thu Jul 08, 2004 1:46 pm Ok first off let's rule Kaworu out because we all know 90% of the people here (including me) would choose him. My favorite angel was Leliel solely because of the way unit 01 broke out of that thing. That scene gave me the chills, and I had nightmares for weeks.

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Thu Jul 08, 2004 2:05 pm Mi favorite is SACHIEL !!!! Don't you think its so cute the way he blinks his eyes???

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Thu Jul 08, 2004 2:06 pm Nephilim wrote: Mi favorite is SACHIEL !!!! Don't you think its so cute the way he blinks his eyes???

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Thu Jul 08, 2004 2:19 pm Yeah !!! here i leave you a nice animation of the blinking, it's so cute !!!

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Thu Jul 08, 2004 2:32 pm Hmm... i think my favorite is Bardiel.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Thu Jul 08, 2004 2:54 pm Nephilim wrote: Mi favorite is SACHIEL !!!! Don't you think its so cute the way he blinks his eyes???

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Thu Jul 08, 2004 3:31 pm Sachiel was awesome, especially his design and being one of the few angels that got a chance to own Eva-01. Zereul just kicked plan ass taking apart Asuaka and its final fight with Shinji and then being killed and eaten brutally. And then Arael was awesome becasue its design was so unique and was only a glowing light. And then its whole physco attack on Asuaka paired with the "Hallejah" song, which I want to say was the "Messiah" by Mozart, that scene was just incredible, it left me speechless.

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Thu Jul 08, 2004 3:34 pm Zeruel baby!

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Thu Jul 08, 2004 3:36 pm Arael- looks cool and can really mess with your mind

[]:             Quote Post by Somnius Kenate » Thu Jul 08, 2004 5:09 pm Leliel. Theoretic quantum chronodymanic physics is pretty interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Thu Jul 08, 2004 5:18 pm Imago-That other angel from Second Impression. It looked some gant flying mushroom. My favorite regular series one is Bardiel because that thing had the Gumby ARms of Doom!

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Thu Jul 08, 2004 5:39 pm Flying mushroom? I don't think I've seen that one.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Thu Jul 08, 2004 6:21 pm Hunter21 wrote: Arael- looks cool and can really mess with your mind

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Thu Jul 08, 2004 7:29 pm Asuka Langley wrote: Flying mushroom? I don't think I've seen that one.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Thu Jul 08, 2004 7:39 pm WTF IS THAT!

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Thu Jul 08, 2004 7:41 pm Something from Second Impression! I have no Idea what I can do but I like it. Maybe Monkey knows somthing?

[]:             Quote Post by Quiddity » Thu Jul 08, 2004 8:30 pm My personal fave would be Zeruel, the wacky skull faced one with the toilet paper for arms. Easily the best fight in the whole series, and suffers the most unfortunate fate :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Thu Jul 08, 2004 10:30 pm I've said it once, I'll say it again, "Angel, the other white meat!"

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Thu Jul 08, 2004 11:38 pm EVA-01X wrote: Asuka Langley wrote: Flying mushroom? I don't think I've seen that one.

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Thu Jul 08, 2004 11:39 pm Asuka Langley wrote: EVA-01X wrote: Asuka Langley wrote: Flying mushroom? I don't think I've seen that one.
